name: Assembly — Fixed Seating
description: Assembly uses with fixed seating intended for the production and viewing of performing arts or motion pictures.

name: Assembly — Food/Drink
description: Assembly uses intended for food and/or drink consumption.

name: Assembly — Worship, Recreation, Other
description: Assembly uses intended for worship, recreation, or amusement not classified as A-1 or A-2.

name: Assembly — Indoor Sporting
description: Assembly uses intended for viewing indoor sporting events and activities with spectator seating.

name: Assembly — Outdoor
description: Assembly uses intended for participation in or viewing outdoor activities.

name: Business
description: Office, professional, or service-type transactions. Includes outpatient medical and educational above 12th grade.

name: Educational
description: Use by 6 or more persons through 12th grade, and day care for more than 5 children older than 2½.

name: Factory Industrial — Moderate Hazard
description: Factory uses that are not classified as F-2.

name: Factory Industrial — Low Hazard
description: Factory uses involving noncombustible or low-hazard materials.

name: High Hazard
description: Manufacturing, processing, generation, or storage of materials that constitute a physical or health hazard.

name: Institutional — Supervised
description: Housing more than 16 persons who are capable of self-preservation, on a 24-hour basis.

name: Institutional — Medical/Incapable
description: Medical care on a 24-hour basis for more than 5 persons who are not capable of self-preservation.

name: Institutional — Restrained
description: More than 5 persons are under restraint or security.

name: Institutional — Day Care
description: Day care for more than 5 persons of any age.

name: Mercantile
description: Display and sale of merchandise. Includes wholesale stores accessible to the public.

name: Residential — Transient
description: Sleeping units where occupants are primarily transient (less than 30 days).

name: Residential — Permanent
description: Sleeping units or more than 2 dwelling units where occupants are primarily permanent.

name: Residential — Small
description: One- and two-family dwellings and their accessory structures.

name: Storage — Moderate Hazard
description: Storage that is not classified as S-2.

name: Storage — Low Hazard
description: Storage of noncombustible materials.

name: Utility / Miscellaneous
description: Not classified in any specific group, and not a significant hazard to public safety.
